name: Calendar
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from examples/astryx/.astryx-sandbox/node_modules/@astryxdesign/core/src/Calendar/Calendar.tsx (react-tsx adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: hasOutsideDays
props.description:
Show days from adjacent months (grayed out).
Default: true

props.name: hasWeekNumbers
props.description:
Show ISO week numbers in a side column.
Default: false

props.name: hasVariableRowCount
props.description:
Use variable rows per month vs. fixed 6-row grid.
Default: false (fixed 6 rows for consistent height)

events.name: focusDateChange
events.description: Callback when visible month changes via navigation
